prompt:
Use my uploaded face image as the primary identity reference. Preserve my exact facial identity with extremely high fidelity: identical facial structure, jawline, cheekbones, eye shape, eyebrows, nose shape, lips, beard pattern, hairstyle, hair texture, skin tone, skin texture, and overall recognizable appearance. Maintain authentic facial proportions, natural skin details, realistic imperfections, and true likeness. Do not beautify, stylize, age, de-age, or alter my identity in any way.

Create an ultra-realistic cinematic nighttime street portrait set in a narrow historic European alleyway. The subject stands alone beneath a warm vintage streetlamp, leaning casually against a metal signpost attached to an old stone wall. The mood is deeply introspective, lonely, contemplative, and emotionally cinematic, as if captured during a quiet midnight walk through an ancient city.

The environment consists of weathered stone architecture with centuries-old textures, cracked masonry, worn surfaces, and dramatic shadows. The alley is narrow and mostly empty, creating a strong sense of isolation and stillness. The ground is paved with aged cobblestones reflecting subtle golden light from the streetlamp above.

The subject stands with hands partially tucked into loose pockets, body slightly angled toward the wall, head gently tilted downward in contemplation. Expression is calm, serious, thoughtful, and emotionally reserved. Eyes are directed toward the ground rather than the camera, conveying solitude and reflection. No smile.

Outfit:
•Oversized faded charcoal-gray t-shirt
•Loose black wide-leg trousers
•Clean white sneakers
•Minimal accessories
•Natural fabric folds and realistic clothing texture
•Relaxed modern streetwear aesthetic

Lighting:
•Single overhead tungsten streetlamp as the dominant light source
•Rich amber-orange illumination
•Deep cinematic shadows
•Strong chiaroscuro contrast
•Soft falloff into darkness
•Warm highlights on skin and clothing
•Natural shadow gradients along the wall
•Realistic nighttime exposure
•No artificial studio lighting

•Historic stone alleyway
•Vintage European architecture
